title: [FIRRTL][IMDCE] Extend weak annotation support to more than ports

features.name: wire with annotations containing hierpath references
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with annotations that reference hierarchical path symbols via circt.nonlocal
features.snippet:
hw.hierpath private @nla_1 [@Foo1::@dead, @EncodingModule]
firrtl.wire {annotations = [{circt.nonlocal = @nla_1, class = "OMIRTracker", id = 2 : i64}]} : !firrtl.uint<1>

features.name: weak annotation handling on declarations (not ports)
features.description: Code should include declarations (wire/logic) with annotations marked as weak that should be pruned when the referenced hierpath is unused
features.snippet:
hw.hierpath private @nla_1 [@Foo1::@dead, @EncodingModule]
hw.hierpath private @nla_2 [@Foo2::@live, @EncodingModule]
firrtl.wire {annotations = [{circt.nonlocal = @nla_1, class = "OMIRTracker"}, {circt.nonlocal = @nla_2, class = "OMIRTracker"}]} : !firrtl.uint<1>
